media.description:
NEUWIED, Germany and STUTTGART, Germany, June 21, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- For more than 45 years, Lohmann has been developing custom-fit adhesive solutions for a wide range of applications in vehicles. With its worldwide production sites and service offerings, the company comprehensively supports vehicle manufacturers in optimizing their products and processes and meeting the highest quality standards. At this year's Battery Show Europe, which will take place from June 28 to 30 in Stuttgart, Germany, the adhesive specialist will primarily present adhesive solutions for optimal thermal management and reliable electrical management in the battery.

Customized bonding solutions for EV batteries from Lohmann
Customized bonding solutions for EV batteries from Lohmann
With increasing electromobility and the rapidly growing market for EV batteries, many new challenges also arise for bonding that go far beyond reliable joining per se.

media.description:
As a global technology leader, Fischer can build on decades of experience. The company offers measurement solutions for all aspects of battery and H/EV technology that are specifically tailored to the requirements of these measurement tasks.

Among others, the FISCHERSCOPE® X-RAY XDAL® will be presented. With its X-Ray systems, the company offers highly efficient solutions for non-destructive coating thickness measurement as well as material analysis on the smallest structures down to the nanometer range. The broad product portfolio of portable coating thickness gauges for non-destructive quality control is characterized by fast, reliable and precise measurement results and can be used in a wide range of applications. The practical handheld devices of the FMP series as well as the devices of the MP0 and MP0R series are available for demonstration. With the MMS PC2 test stand, Fischer will show an excerpt of its automation solutions.
